create_password.policy_length: Password length must be between 8 – 30 characters.
create_password.policy_case_digit: A minimum of 1 uppercase character, 1 lowercase character and 1 digit.
create_password.policy_repeat: Same character cannot be repeated more than 3 times.
create_password.policy_special: Must contain at least one special character ! # ( ) * - / : ? @ [ ] ^
